# Overview

This document describes the flow for inquiring policy information. The system receives a policy type as input, validates it, and returns a policy/customer number or an error message, routing the output based on the communication mode.

## Dependencies

### Program

- LGIPVS01 (<SwmPath>[base/src/lgipvs01.cbl](base/src/lgipvs01.cbl)</SwmPath>)
